findings.text: It meant she had already spent her screams on the days before.
findings.whatItRestates: She made no sound at all. That was worse than screaming.

findings.text: His gaze kept moving down the lane as if the right angle might produce the missing people.
findings.deletionTest: His gaze kept moving down the lane, hunting for the missing people.
findings.suggestedFix: His gaze kept moving down the lane, hunting for the missing people.

findings.text: The dead had gone north. The living still had to go south.
findings.couldEndEarlierAt: Somewhere ahead, people in another market still took the cough in their streets for ordinary sickness and the grain on their tables for safe food.

findings.text: No comfort in it, only confirmation.
findings.povMismatch: The verdict fragment captions the exchanged look from outside Sylvanas's body instead of staying with the operational read she takes from it.

findings.text: He said it the way locals said useful things on bad roads—without drama, in pieces, leaving the listener to know which part mattered.
findings.povMismatch: The sentence generalizes about 'locals' from essay distance instead of staying with Sylvanas's immediate evaluation of this specific trader.

findings.text: That was a different answer from the one Jaina had been giving on the road—the full thought, not the soldier-sized version she had been breaking apart for an officer she did not yet trust to want the whole thing.
findings.failedQuestion: What does this cash out to?
findings.missingPayload: The specific shorter road-version of Jaina's warning that the sentence compresses into 'soldier-sized version.'
findings.suggestedFix: That was more than Jaina had been giving her on the road.

findings.text: Sixty bodies moving in a column toward Quel'Thalas meant intent, and intent meant a hand on the line somewhere out in the dark.
findings.missingPayload: A concrete controlling sign beyond the northbound column itself; the sentence leaps from formation to an unseen guiding hand.
findings.suggestedFix: Sixty bodies moving in a column toward Quel'Thalas was warning enough.

audits.cleanReason: No translation-setup exchange appears in the chapter: nobody asks for plainer speech, smaller words, or a street-level version before a reply.

summary.verdictReason: Fail: two moderate pass-B kills remain (chapter-close closure addiction and an unsupported controller inference), plus five mild sentence-level pass-B issues.

textureMetrics.interpretation: PARTICIPIAL PHRASES: 3.2% (floor: 5.0%, human: 11.0%). Add ', Ving' phrases to connect actions: ', turning back to the fire' / ', gripping the railing with both hands'. These create connective tissue between actions. | SEMICOLONS: 0.2% (floor: 0.3%, human: 1.4%). Join related clauses: 'She didn't answer; the question wasn't meant for her.'
